scripts.test: bun run test:js && bun run test:rust
scripts.test:js: cargo build -p codexchat-cli && bun run --filter @dhruv2mars/codexchat test:coverage
scripts.check: bun run check:js && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.release:tag: TAG="v$(node -p \"require('./packages/cli/package.json').version\")" && git tag "$TAG" && git push origin "$TAG"
